title: PHP Variable Scope
codeExample:
<?php
$counter = 0;

function increment() {
    global $counter;
    $counter++;
}

increment();
increment();
echo $counter; // 2

// Using $GLOBALS
function resetCounter() {
    $GLOBALS['counter'] = 0;
}

resetCounter();
echo $counter; // 0
?>

quiz.question: Can a function access a global variable by default?
Which array provides access to all global variables?
